body: Fix the relay listener install permanently. Run these in PowerShell exactly: $src = "C:\Users\User\Desktop\Work\# EX MACHINA\focus\x_strategies ix"; Copy-Item "$src\relay-listener.ps1" "$HOME\relay-listener.ps1" -Force; Copy-Item "$src\install-relay-listener.ps1" "$HOME\install-relay-listener.ps1" -Force; Unregister-ScheduledTask -TaskName "RelayListener" -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; & "$HOME\install-relay-listener.ps1"; Then confirm by running: Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName "RelayListener" | Select State; and report back via the relay.
